feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Credit Horizon in SAP SD
entry.content: What happens when we maintain Credit Horizon at Sales Order Level, At Delivery Creation Level and at PGI Level for a Particular Customer in SAP SD?

entry.title: Want to know how to implement password management od SAPSR3 user
entry.content:
Business wants password policy for expiry, invalid attempts etc. to be implemented for all db users, including db default & SAPSR3 schema user. How to do and what is the impact.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Hinweis 3498986 has got wrong where close, to and from are mixed up
entry.content:
Where clause does not make sense. 

99991231 makes sense, but for to variable, not for from variable.

entry.title: Return to supplier process in case of replaced Goods
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts,

In case of supplier return with PO Return, if the supplier propose to replace the items returned with new ones which have differents caractéristiques (Batch, Shelf Life..etc) How do I integrate those matrials 

 

1- Create PO QTY = 300, Good receipt
2- PO Return  with Qty 100, Good issue  MVT TYPE 161
3- if the supplier raplace the 100 quantity with new ones (New bathes & Caracteristics), how to enter those materials in the system ?

entry.title: Meas doc creation allows points for items not related to Notif Tech OBj
entry.content:
While maintaining a notification for a tech object, users are going to Extras/Measurement Docs.

They then enter a measurement point. The MP entered is not related to the Tech Object on the notification.

Is this proper behavior? Do we need to find a note (I have not found one) or use a badi to enforce Meas Points belong to the notification being maintained?

entry.title: File Transfer from SAP ECC to S3 bucket using AWS SDK
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are trying to establish file transfer from SAP ECC to S3 bucket using AWS SDK.
Kindly help to suggest the prerequisites and setup procedure for the same.

Regards,



------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Intrastat Declaration Job Not Picking Up Entries in S/4HANA 2023 On-Premise
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We are working with S/4HANA On-Premise, Release 2023, and are encountering an issue with our Intrastat declaration.

We have goods receipts and goods issues recorded with EU partners. Invoices have also been issued, though I understand that this might not be relevant. However, the job for generating the Intrastat declaration is not picking up any items. There is no error message being generated. What could be the reason that no positions are being captured in the Intrastat declaration job? 

One more thing about the POI: In newer releases a POI can be linked to a business partner. Is that field necessary for our process? The POI we created is not linked to a business partner. 

Any insights or suggestions would be greatly appreciated. Thank you!

entry.title: HU-Management in WM - requirements in MD04
entry.content:
Hello,

We are setting up Handling Unit Management in WM. Picking will be done in a HU storage location for a production order or network. When creating the delivery with delivery type HOD, this creates an additional requirement in MD04 in addition to the order reservation. This means that I have double requirements.

The requirement for the delivery should be offset against the requirement for the order reservation (AR-RES). It should be seen in MD04 that a delivery has been triggered for the material.

Is this possible? Does anyone know the relevant customizing settings for this?

I would be grateful for any advice.

Frederik

entry.title: Mostrar pages o páginas en S/4HANA Cloud Public
entry.content: Cuando entro en mi Dashboard de mi trial de S/4HANA Cloud Public, sin haber elegido antes mis intereses cuando creé mi cuenta, no me aparecían las cards (tarjetas) con los tópicos que había elegido. Posteriormente volví a crear otra cuenta (ID) eligiendo mis intereses, temas o tópicos que me ofrecía el trial, posteriormente aparecieron en el dashboard.

entry.title: SAP EWM Error message /SCWM/UI_RF021
entry.content:
Hello everybody.

I am getting the following message everytime I try to confirm a warehouse task on RFUI but only with this SKU

Picking and Putaway get the same message
I suspect that it could be something related to the conversion Unit. Maybe someone modified MM02 or MAT1 of this material and messed something up. All my conversion units are in Spanish, not english.

entry.title: Payment Proposal F110 - SWBP Stop Event Raised
entry.content:
Dear All,

I have issue with Custom Workflow for Payment Proposal.

I have a Custom Table for Approval. The Approval mechanism is sequence process, i.e 4 step.

In every step can have 1 or more approval. 

step approval
1 ==> Approval A or B
2 ==> Approval A or C
3 ==> Approval D
4 ==> Approval E


when proposal created, user A and B will receive wf in their inbox.

we use zprogram to approve/reject the payment proposal through inbox (sbwp).

The issue come when user A or B open payment proposal through inbox/swbp (just open, no click approve), then the payment proposal disappear in another user inbox (sbwp) but it is still there for user A. This happened in every step which have more than one approval.
Does anyone here have the same experience? or any constructive suggestion to help me solve my issue.

Thanks in advance.

SAP Business Workflow

entry.title: How to make a CFL based field non-editable in SAP GUI transaction ?
entry.content:
I am trying to add a field to Business Context PS_PROJECT using Custom Fields App.

I am able to add the field and enable it on Project Definition tcodes ( CJ01/02/03 )

Having said that the field is editable by default. Now i have a required to make this field non-editable. Key point here is this field is on a SAP-GUI transaction and not out of the box Fiori app

How can this be achieved ?

entry.title: Ship-to address changes in deliveries and shipments already completed.
entry.content:
Hi,

I hope someone can help me with the following issue.

Our standard practice is to manually enter ship-to addresses for sales orders. This process triggers the creation of a new ADRNR, which is then propagated when creating subsequent documents.

Sometimes, after the completion of some deliveries, it may become necessary to modify the ship-to address specified on the order. This adjustment should apply only to outstanding deliveries, still, it's also affecting deliveries that have already been completed, which means we're losing the information about where those shipments actually went.

We're aware of a user exit that allows us to create a new ADRNR for the modification instead of changing the address for the current one. By creating a new ADRNR, we avoid affecting completed deliveries, but it doesn't change pending deliveries, which is a requirement.

Does anyone have experience with a similar issue or know how we can prevent this from happening?

Thanks in advance for your cooperation.

Ginno Giuffra

entry.title: Free goods in purch Info record MM SAP S/4
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts, 

I want to define a rule for free goods in purchasing Info record, 

1- Creation of Info record : condition NR00

 

2- I did a test in ME21N and even Good receipt but I dont get my free goods 

3- GR  (80 000 because I have a conversion rules (1 NV  purch unit= 20 EA stock unit )

 

Could you please advise me

entry.title: how to manage sap landscapes by two solution manager system
entry.content:
Hi experts

I have the next scenario with a customer:

There’s a productive Solution Manager (SMP) where ChaRM manages the transports of a classical 3-systems landscape (ABD100 , ABQ300, ABP300).

____ChaRM in SMP___
ABD100 -> ABQ300 -> ABP300

A new Solution Manager (SMQ) with the role of DEV/QAS is going to be implemented for training and testing  purposes of new solman functionalities.


We want to configure ChaRM in this new Solman SMQ to train new staff in the use of the functionality and obviously we need a managed landscape to move transport requests. According to the note 2915372, only one ChaRM can manage the whole landscape, so, it is not possible to use the landscape of ABD100, ABQ300 and ABP300. But I want to know if it is possible to create 2 new clients in the system ABD (ABD200 and ABD250) to simulate a 2-systems test landscape managed by solman SMQ and handle transport requests between these new clients using ChaRM.
__ChaRM in SMQ__
ABD200 -> ABD250
Please also let me know if there are special considerations, for example it comes to my mind that all transport requests will be created in system ABD but in different clients and managed by different ChaRMs. Can this lead to a problem in the way that ChaRM operates?

Another option is that this new 2-systems test landscape can be created with two clients in the system SMQ (SMQ200 and SMQ250)

__ChaRM in SMQ__
SMQ200 -> SMQ250
Is this possible? Can a Solution Manager be managed by itself?

Kind Regards.

Arturo

entry.title: REFX- Flexible Real Estate Management- Interest Expense Calculation
entry.content:
Hello all, 

I just wanna ask how the interest exp in IFRS16 that is in REFX module calculated? What the approach ? Many of questions I have on it like based on what the interest % multiply is will multiply in clearing or dep. ? 

Please I am looking to full explanation from A to Z on how and what the approach used to calculate the interest exp. For the lease contract in refx. 

 

Thank you all!

entry.title: ECCS periodic rollup file does not pick up the partner unit in the upload file
entry.content:
We are on SAP ERP 6.0 EhP6 and we are using SAP EC-CS with the periodic rollup functionality to send SAP FI data to EC-CS. The file does not pick up for one fs item (that is assigned to one gl account) the partner information and the fs item has a breakdown that allows to post a partner unit for the fs item.

In the table GLT3 the gl account has a partner unit but in the periodic file does not have any.

Is there any configuration setting for SAP EC-CS periodic role up file where we could configure this?

entry.title: Version management in SAP ERP
entry.content:
Hello,

We're undergoing a landscape upgrade to SAP NW 7.5 EHP 8
As part of the upgrade process, the test environment was copied over to the dev environment via system copy. Thus, all the version management data was overwritten.

My question is this - I know that a part of the version management data is stored in table VRS_DISP and VRSD. Do You have any idea on a way to restore this data from a backup. Either a table transport or another method?

entry.title: se319 - when deleting SES
entry.content:
Dear All,

Service PO created with one PO line item and 10 service line items (without service No.)

For Service line item 6 and 7 , Service entry sheet created and GRN also posted in the background.

In the SES display, it is showing all the 9 line items with zero quantity except 6 and 7.

After GR user has manually revoked the Acceptance indicator.

Now client want to delete the service entry sheet but it is showing error as"Please enter the quantity SE319".

If i enter quantity then following error displays "SE363 Quantity exceeds the quantity in purchase order"

Please suggest how to delete the service entry sheet.

entry.title: Tax condition type is determined in the sales order but not determined in the invoice
entry.content: We have created a new tax condition type for Argentina in V/06 and maintained the relevant condition records in VK11. Issue is, sometimes, the tax condition type is getting determined in the sales order but when the invoice is created by background job (program: SDBILLDL), the same condition type is not getting determined in the invoice. When i check the pricing analysis, it shows "Condition record exists, but has not been set". It is not a manual condition, hence it cannot be deleted from the document. Also the tax condition record has already been created two months before itself. I tried replicating the issue in lower environments but i can see that the tax condition type is getting determined successfully for the same invoice data. Can you please let me know what could be the reason the tax condition is not getting determined sometimes in the invoice alone?
